reasoning: Donald Trump signed an executive order on May 2, 2025, directing the Corporation for Public Broadcasting to cease funding for NPR and PBS. This directly mirrors the Project 2025 objective to "stop funding for NPR and PBS." Although the CPB and NPR are pushing back and legal battles are likely, the Keep_Track Project 2025 Tracker spreadsheet generally updates items to "complete" when the administration takes definitive executive action towards the goal. Since the EO was specifically issued to fulfill this objective, it is highly likely (75% probability) that the spreadsheet maintainers will mark the status as "complete" before July 1, 2025, reflecting the administration's official completion of its stated policy agenda.
